title: Hot Air Balloon Theme Welcome Baby Banner Garland Blue Clouds Hot Air Balloon Baby Shower Decors Travel Adventure Hanging Decor for Boy Girl Travel World Gender Reveal Birthday Party Supplies
features: Package includes: You will get 1* blue hot air balloon theme welcome baby banner that has 13 pieces, 1* blue hot air balloon theme garland that has 8 pieces, ideal for decorating your baby shower party. The garland has pre-strung and the banner need you to assemble by yourself, just string the cardstock and ribbon together, it’s not difficult for you

Enchanting design: This banner garland set boasts an enchanting design with blue hot air balloons, fluffy clouds, and clear “WELCOME BABY” lettering. The hot air balloons come in various patterns, adding a sense of whimsy and adventure. It's like bringing a dreamy sky scene to your baby shower, creating a magical atmosphere

Soft blue color: The color palette is dominated by soft blue tones. These soft blue colors evoke a calm and gentle feel, suitable for a baby shower where a peaceful and warm ambiance is desired. The color also matches well with other baby-related decor, making it easy to integrate into different party setups

High-quality material: Our hot air balloon themed banner and garland are made of high quality cardstock, not easy to deform, fade and break down. So the patterns appear more clearer and more beautiful under the premium material. Making your baby shower party more attractive

Wide application: This travel adventure theme party decors set is suitable for clouds hot air balloon theme baby shower party, hot air balloon theme gender reveal party, adventure theme boy birthday party, hot air balloon lovers party, travel world theme family gathering, travel adventure theme boys party, up up and away adventure theme celebration and so on. Elevating a joyful party vibe
description: The hot air balloon theme banner and garland can be used both indoors and outdoors. It can be applied to many places, such as the wall, fireplace, front door, stairs, window, yard, balcony and so on. Meeting your multiple decorative need You will get: 1* blue hot air balloon theme welcome baby banner 1* blue hot air balloon theme garland
